title: SQL: LIKE incorrect with _
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, description) VALUES ('aapX', 'First entry');
INSERT INTO test_table (name, description) VALUES ('abc|aapX', 'Second entry');
INSERT INTO test_table (name, description) VALUES ('abc|aap_beer', 'Third entry');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE name LIKE 'abc|aap_%' ESCAPE '|';
key_bug_features: LIKE operator fails with underscore wildcard
